items.title: Opencodemod
items.text: Short aliases for launching OpenCode. Keeps the interactive and default modes easy to start.

items.title: Changelog
items.text: All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. See commit-and-tag-version for commit guidelines.

items.title: Features
items.text:
• alias: add oc alias for opencode (2386969)
  • alias: add ocn alias to replace previous oc behavior (df07c65)
  • alias: make oc alias continue previous session (abe60ef)
